title: Fireline
description: FireLine allows you to create custom warps, also allows you to create homes and make tpa
body:
FireLine is a warp, homes and tpa management plugin that allows players to set, list and teleport to custom locations in their Minecraft world. With an intuitive menu-driven interface, players can easily create warps with customizable names and access them through a simple command system.

This plugin is still under development, so if you want a specific update go to [Discord](https://discord.gg/6SYZ95GR3S).

# Features:
- Warp creation and deletion system.
- System of homes
- tpa system
- Command to check the whole list of commands of the Fireline plugin, command /fireline
- Warps database: warps are stored in a file in YAML format, ensuring that locations and their respective creators are preserved between sessions.

# Installation:
- Download the plugin.
- Place the .jar file in the plugins folder of your server.
- Restart the server and enjoy warps management.
# Requirements:
- Minecraft server spigot, bukkit or paper 1.20, 1.20.1.
- Administrator permissions to install the plugin.
